emergency.title: Crash Report
emergency.whenToUseTools: If reloading doesn’t help after 3 tries ↓
emergency.softReset: Reset everything except login info and reload
emergency.hardReset: Reset everything (login info will also be lost)
emergency.supportDesc: If reloading doesn't resolve the issue, there may be a serious problem. Check the latest updates using the link below.
emergency.reportFailed: Failed to send report (Hint: This only works on official deployments)
messages: The internet is a wonderful place, but sometimes things go wrong. Try the buttons below.
Computers are mysterious. Reloading might fix the issue.
Strange things happen sometimes. Let’s solve this together — try the buttons below.
The system hit a small bump. A retry might do the trick.
Something didn’t go as planned. Try reloading.
Things might not be working correctly right now. Try reloading.
Oops! Something went wrong. Try reloading.

notificationSettings.title: Notifications
notificationSettings.singleDeviceNote: Push notifications are delivered only to the last browser (or device) where they were enabled. Enabling them in another browser will stop delivery to this one.
notificationSettings.permissionDeniedApp: Notification permission has been denied by the OS. Please allow notifications for this app in your device settings.
notificationSettings.permissionDeniedWeb: Notification permission has been denied by the browser. Please allow notifications for this site in your browser settings.

welcome.loadFailed:
Failed to load account information.
The key stored on this device has not been lost. Please try again.
welcome.welcomeBackDescriptionDevice: We found an account saved on this device.
welcome.welcomeBackDescriptionBrowser: We found an account saved in this browser.
welcome.continueFailed: Failed to continue. Please try again.
welcome.removeAccountFromDevice: Remove this account from this device
welcome.resetBrowserAccount: Reset account data in this browser

recovery.title: Check your registered server
recovery.descriptionDevice: This device has account data, but no registration was found on the current server.
recovery.descriptionBrowser: This browser has account data, but no registration was found on the current server.
recovery.deleteBrowserAccount: Delete account data from this browser

accountSetup.title: Create Account
accountSetup.chooseServerDescription: Choose a server to register on, then complete registration in your browser.
accountSetup.waitingForRegistration: Waiting for your account to be created on the server.
accountSetup.waitingForRegistrationAuto: Waiting for your account to be created on the server. You will proceed automatically once registration is complete.
accountSetup.registrationStartFailed: Could not start registration. Please try again.
accountSetup.appRecommendedTitle: We recommend creating your account in the app
accountSetup.appRecommendedDescription: The app makes it easier to store your master key and move between devices. Scan the QR code below with your smartphone to get the app.
accountSetup.backupDescription: This master key is required to recover your account. Download it and store it in a safe place before continuing registration.
accountSetup.downloadStarted: Download started. Check where the file was saved before proceeding to registration.
accountSetup.downloadWarning: If you lose this file, you may not be able to recover your account on another device or browser.
accountSetup.readyDescriptionDevice: Registration confirmed. Finally, register the key this device will use.
accountSetup.readyDescriptionBrowser: Registration confirmed. Finally, register the key this browser will use.
accountSetup.finalizeFailedNetwork: Registration failed. Check your network connection and try again.

accountImport.title: Import Account
accountImport.descriptionDevice: Enter your master key to use your account on this device.
accountImport.descriptionBrowser: Enter your master key to use your account in this browser.
accountImport.masterKeyInvalid: Could not verify this master key.
accountImport.existingAccountDescription: To import a new account, you must first delete the account data saved in this browser.
accountImport.existingMasterKeyNotice: This browser already has a master key.
accountImport.deleteBrowserAccount: Delete account data from this browser

profile.blockConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to block this user?
profile.blockConfirmDescription: Blocking will prevent this user from replying to you or reacting to your posts, but they will still be able to see your public posts.
profile.unblockConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to unblock this user?
profile.unblockConfirmDescription: Unblocking will allow this user to reply to you and react to your posts again.

id.title: ID Management
id.passportDescription: View your current ID, registered server, and credentials.

activitypub.title: ActivityPub Settings
activitypub.enableDescription: Enabling integration lets you connect with ActivityPub-compatible social networks.

apPerson.apUserNotice: This user is an ActivityPub user.

home.loadFailed: Failed to load (the server may be offline)

privateContentDoor.approvalRequired: You need the owner's approval to view this content.

domainOfflineBanner.offline: Your domain {{domain}} is currently in read-only mode due to being offline. Please wait until it is restored.

messageInspector.title: Inspector
messageInspector.keyMismatch: The key recovered from the signature does not match the verification key

renderError.serverOffline: The server hosting this message is offline

themeEditor.title: Theme Editor
themeEditor.builtinNameProtected: Built-in theme names cannot be overwritten
themeEditor.currentlyInUse: This theme is currently in use

themeImporter.title: Import from v1
themeImporter.description: Paste the JSON exported with "Copy all" in the v1 theme settings, or a ```theme block. Themes with the same name as an existing one will be skipped.

subkeyInvalidDrawer.ckidNotFound: Key information for this device was not found.
subkeyInvalidDrawer.titleDevice: The key on this device is no longer valid
subkeyInvalidDrawer.titleBrowser: The key on this device is no longer valid
subkeyInvalidDrawer.revokedDevice: Due to a server reset or an action from another device, the key (sub-key) used on this device has been revoked.
subkeyInvalidDrawer.revokedBrowser: Due to a server reset or an action from another device, the key (sub-key) used in this browser has been revoked.
subkeyInvalidDrawer.reactivateHintDevice: Press "Reactivate Key" to restore this device's key.
subkeyInvalidDrawer.reactivateHintBrowser: Press "Reactivate Key" to restore this browser's key.
subkeyInvalidDrawer.reloginHintDevice: To post or make other changes, please log out and log in again.
subkeyInvalidDrawer.reloginHintBrowser: To post or make other changes, please log out and log in again using a QR code or your master key.
subkeyInvalidDrawer.reactivateFailed: Failed to reactivate the key. Please try again.
subkeyInvalidDrawer.reactivateFailedRetryLater: Failed to reactivate the key. Please try again later.

searchExplorer.searchServiceUnavailable: Could not connect to the search service

profileEditor.selectViewersNote: To select a user, you need to follow them first.

aliasSetup.title: Set Alias
aliasSetup.description: You can bind a domain you own to your ID as an alias. Enter a domain to see the DNS record you need to set.
aliasSetup.dnsInstruction: Add the following TXT record to your domain's DNS, then press Continue.
aliasSetup.masterKeyRequired: This operation requires logging in with your master key.
aliasSetup.verificationFailed: The TXT record could not be verified. DNS changes can take a while to propagate. Please wait a bit and try again.

notificationTimeline.reactionMany: {{name}} and {{others}} others reacted to your post

client.registrationNotFound: Your registration was not found on server {{domain}}
client.registrationNotFoundDesc: This may be caused by a server reset or a migration to another server.

push.browserNotSupported: This browser does not support push notifications
push.browserNotSupportedIos: This browser does not support push notifications (on iOS, add the app to your home screen to enable them)
push.serverNotSupported: This server does not support push notifications

login.title: Log In
login.description: Choose how to log in to use Concrnt in this browser.
login.masterKeyInvalid: Could not verify this master key.
login.masterKeyInvalidDetailed: Could not verify this master key. Please enter your 12-word master key.
login.passkeyUnavailable: Passkeys are not available in this browser.
login.passkeyNoUserHandle: Could not get an account ID from this passkey.
login.passkeyNoRegistration: No registration was found for this passkey.
login.passkeyNoPrf: This passkey does not support the PRF extension required for login.
login.registrationNotFoundOnRecommended: No registration was found on the recommended server. Please enter the server you registered on.
login.registrationNotFoundOnServer: No registration was found on the specified server.
login.registeringKey: Registering the key this browser will use...

register.title: Account Registration
register.successDescription: You can close this screen and return to the original app.
register.invalidRequest: Could not verify the registration request. Please open this page again from the original screen.
register.formDescription: The information you enter here is not a public profile. It is reviewed by the server administrator for registration screening and contact purposes.

qrSetup.confirmEmoji: Check the emoji shown on your device, and if it matches, select "Yes" on the device.
